ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model (e.g., logistic regression, random forest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated, experimental) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the model owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the training session started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the training session ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the training session */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON-formatted hyperparameters used in the training session */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the training session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the training session was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session the metric belongs to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "train_loss" REAL /* Training loss at the current epoch */,
  "valid_loss" REAL /* Validation loss at the current epoch */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy at the current epoch */,
  "recall_score" REAL /* Recall score at the current epoch */,
  "precision_score" REAL /* Precision score at the current epoch */,
  "roc_auc_score" REAL /* ROC AUC score at the current epoch */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken for the current epoch */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., train, validation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who recorded the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON-formatted user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
